watermark.valueCandidate: Synthesia watermark appears on Freemium videos and on API videos generated with test=true.
watermark.snippet: Synthesia's watermark help says freemium videos carry the logo watermark, and API requests with test=true generate watermarked videos while test=false removes the watermark.
watermark.sourceTitle: How do I remove the Synthesia Watermark? | Synthesia Help

commercialUse.valueCandidate: Synthesia allows authorised branded use and business promotion with custom or webcam avatars.
commercialUse.snippet: Synthesia's platform-integrity guidance says authorised branded use and business promotion are allowed with custom/webcam avatars when content follows moderation policies.
